posts.title: Three blinking lights in Rio de Janeiro spotted by a pilot after takeoff [2015]
posts.text_preview:
OCTOBER 4th, 2015. Five minutes after taking off with a plane from Rio de Janeiro Tom Jobim International Airport, a pilot resident in the city of Jundiaí, São Paulo reported seeing three agglutinated blinking lights. Their colors were red, blue and ambar and they were apparently stationary at an altitude of approximately 23.000 ft. The sight, according to the pilot’s report, occurried over Santa Cruz district, in the west zone of Rio de Janeiro city.

The pilot also reported to COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], his own impressions about the event: “It is strange

posts.title: Bright white zigzagging UFO sighted in Manaus – AM [2015]
posts.text_preview: SEPTEMBER 4th, 2015. posts.title: Two spherical ufos spotted at incredible speed in Ivaiporã. [2015]
posts.text_preview:
AUGUST 31st, 2015 – In downtown Ivaiporã, a small city in the state of Paraná, at 7:45pm, a civil servant observed two white and spherical objects deslocating about 10 miles apart from each other, and at an altitude of approximately 15 miles high. The two unidentified flying objects, according to the report given to COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], were heading North at an approximate speed of 1,000 mph. Still according to the report, “the two objects then seemed to merged into one another”.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacio

posts.title: A round white flashing UFO moving slowly over Manaus’ Air Base [2015]
posts.text_preview:
According to a report given to COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], on August the 17th, 2015 at 11:20pm, three people saw a round flashing white object right above Manaus’ Air Base, moving slowly at approximately 700 miles of altitude. The witnesses, as reported, had meteorological and aviation knowledge. It was a clear sky night and they requested a rescue vehicle from the Air Force Base to check the object, but as soon as the vehicle was ready, the light started to turn off slowly. The object made no noise and left no marks or trails in the sky.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIO

posts.text_preview: JULY 29th, 2015 – 14h25. While flying over the southern region of the State of Minas Gerais, about to enter the airspace of the State of São Paulo, a fighter jet pilot from the Brazilian Air Force spotted an unidentified flying object for about a minute. The occurrence was reported to COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] in the following terms: “the presence of a long tubular black object at approximately 33,000 feet of altitude, positioned to the left and close to the path of our descent (.. .) “. posts.title: Three different airliners report the same UFO sighting [2015]
posts.text_preview: JULY, 23rd, 2015. 11:15 am. In a clear sky night over the city of Palmas, capital of the State of Tocantins, a flashing luminous object with no defined shape with colors oscillating between blue and green was spotted by four witnesses from three different airliners. According to them, the object was at an altitude of approximately 34,000 feet, moving in a straight line in the SE / NE direction following air traffic. The sighting lasted about 20 minutes. The official report also included complementary observations made by COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] based on

posts.title: A UFO spotted near an airstrip in Manaus Air Base  [2015]
posts.text_preview: JULY 4th, 2015. Under a clear sky, around 01h40 in the morning, an operator at the Manaus Air Base Tower spotted an object without a defined shape and in a static position, resembling medium intensity lights. The object was seen in the vicinity of one of the airfield’s airstrips. As the official report informs, there was a video and image recording made by cell phone, attached to the occurrence file, but they were not made available to the AN’s UFO Fund. posts.title: Aircraft pilot performs evasive maneuvers after detecting UFO just 2,500 feet away [2015]
posts.text_preview: JUNE 17, 2015. At 8h52pm, a pilot with an aircraft 129 km from Recife, capital of Pernambuco, was alerted by the TCAS (Traffic Collision Avoidance System) of his plane that an object was dangerously close to his aircraft moving back and forth. According to the pilot’s descriptions, the visibility and flight conditions were “CAVOK” (Ceiling and Visibility Okay). The report wrote by the COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] brings the following observations made by the pilot: “Hotel traffic [a military codename for UFO] viewed only at TCAS 2,500 feet below the observer.

posts.title: Two pilots report a TCAS’ detection of a UFO [2015]
posts.text_preview:
MAY 9th, 2015. At 18h04pm, two pilots from the same brazilian air company reported an unidentified flying object – detected by the TCAS (Traffic Collision Avoidance System) of their plane – moving at a speed approximately of 450 km/h and heading Northeast from the State of Rio de Janeiro’s airspace. Still according to the report, the event lasted five minutes and it was only detected by the TCAS. 

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.732. “Questionário sobre ocor

posts.summary: Two airline pilots over Rio de Janeiro airspace tracked a UFO on TCAS moving at ~450 km/h northeast for five minutes on 9 May 2015.

posts.title: Five people spotted a multicolor UFO in Brasilia [2015]
posts.text_preview:
APRIL 10th, 2015. Five people spotted a bright multicolored spherical UFO in Brasília-DF, at 02h10am, moving from NE to SW. The ocurrence was oberved by the witnesses for about one minute under a clear sky and good weather. The COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] filled the report with information given by one of the witnesses who is a military. The representative also wrote his observations in the report: “Telephone contact was made with APP-BR and this agency questioned some aircraft flying in the region, but no one saw the fact reported by the Captain.”

Cf. ARQU

Regarding the form and nature of what may have been the object sighted, the witness’ testimony to COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] also informed: “Bright lights, speed incompatible with known aircraft. posts.title: Two oval shaped metallic UFOs spotted downtown Curitiba by 5 people [2015]
posts.text_preview: JAN 15th, 2015. In Curitiba, Paraná, at 19h51pm a mechanical engineer with knowledge in UFO field research and four more people spotted, with good visibility, two unidentified metallic objects, oval in shape, with about 50 meters of size each, and traveling at about 100km/h. According to witnesses, the objects were at an altitude of approximately 3 km, and, during the 10 minutes of the sighting, they repeatedly moved closer and further away from each other. The UFOs went from the vicinity of the Oscar Niemayer Museum to the city center of Curitiba, in a trajectory reported as from east to west

posts.title: A policeman saw a UFO going up and down in the sky of Alagoinhas [2015]
posts.text_preview:
JAN 7th, 2015. Time: 20h30. The Salvador Approach Control (APP-SV) obtained the information that “a federal highway policeman had spotted an illuminated UFO going up and down in the sky over the city of Alagoinhas, State of Bahia, at around 20h30 pm”. According to the report by COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] based on the information from the APP-SV, “after several attempts, there was no contact to obtain further details about the fact”.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Ref

According to the report given by one of the witnesses to the representative of COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], a student pilot, the object’s shape was of “an inaccurate point”, moving “faster than an approaching aircraft”. The objects were the size of an airliner, but faster than this aeroplane, keeping the approximate distance of 1 km between themselves. posts.title: A round orange UFO spotted twice near an aerodrome airstrip in Cascavel [2014]
posts.text_preview:
DEC 4th, 2014. At 03h00am, an aeronautical station operator at the Cascavel Aerodrome, Paraná, reported two sightings of the same round UFO of strong and intense orange color with approximately 30 cm in size, in the interval of ten minutes, traveling towards the aerodrome after making a left turn. The object moved in an East / West direction, with an approximate speed of 180km / h and 10 NM from Cascavel.

posts.title: Three aircrafts report the same UFO between Quixadá-CE and João Pessoa-PB [2014]
posts.text_preview:
JAN 24th, 2014. One big white UFO was sighted by three different flying aircrafts in two locations within 50 minutes.

FIRST SIGHT: at 09h10am, the aircraft of flight GLO 9109 from Brasília to Fortaleza, at 09h10am, in descent to the airport of Fortaleza, Ceará, reported by its TCAS (Traffic Collision Avoidance System) a fast object, in a zigzag movement, and at a dangerous low altitude of 300 ft, which forced the GLO 9109 pilot to make an evasive maneuver to avoid collision with the UFO.

During a clear afternoon, at Praia da Enseada do Guarujá, State of São Paulo, from the window of her apartment at 04h20pm, a witness observed, for an hour and twenty minutes, an unidentified flying object with a round shape and of a strong white color, at an altitude “much lower than [the] altitude of the plane” making her think it was a helicopter. The object was “at the altitude of a helicopter”, but the witness ruled out this possibility because the object remained “still” and seemed to “swing like a pendulum”. posts.title: A flight controller had visual contact with a UFO over Londrina Airport [2013]
posts.text_preview:
MAY 6th, 2013. A flight controller at the Londrina Airport, Paraná, from 6:36 pm to 6:41 pm, observed an unidentified flying object shaped like an amber yellow light, whose horizontal movement made him think it was an airplane. The witness reported that the object was headed south-east, but did not emit a sound or leave a trail or smoke behind.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.717. “Questionário sobre ocorrência de objeto voador não identificado (ovni) em Lon

posts.title: 3 spherical UFOs followed a passenger plane for 15 minutes near Fortaleza [2013]
posts.text_preview:
FEB 13th, 2013. At the end of the flight that left Manaus for Fortaleza, a pilot reported that 80 nautical miles to reach Fortaleza Airport, at an altitude of 28,000 ft, they spotted 3 luminous spheres following their aircraft. The report was made, according to the file consulted, through the telephone with the ACC-RE [in Recife]. The unidentified flying objects moved at approximately 700 km/h, and they were yellow in color, and spherical in shape. The sighting lasted about 15 minutes and happened at 4:40 am under good weather conditions.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações

posts.title: Pilot and co-pilot of an A320 report large moon-like UFO [2013]
posts.text_preview: OCT 13th, 2013. The pilot and copilot of an A320 aircraft, of flight TAM3773 from Fortaleza, Ceará, to Brasília, DF, when flying over the Barreiras region, in the State of Bahia, at 21h34pm, had visual contact for about 7 seconds with an unidentified flying object of an “oval, large shape, same perspective of the moon”, of a luminous white color. The UFO was traveling approximately with a speed of “around 2,000km/h or more” at an altitude of about 5,000ft, and 1,000ft away from the TAM3773 aircraft. posts.title: Three UFOs filmed moving at random [2013]
posts.text_preview: OCT 6th, 2013. Around 1:44 am in the city of Santo Antônio da Patrulha, State of Rio Grande do Sul, a journalist spotted and recorded on video [see below] three white round UFO’s, apparently small in size and varying the speed as they moved at random, “crossing and grouping in a single focus”. The UFO’s were about 200 meters high and above a high ground, and at a distance of approximately 1,200 meters from the eyewitness. The report of COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] also informs that the sighting took place in conditions of visibility somewhat impaired by the existing fog at th

The UFO’s […]
posts.summary: A journalist filmed three small white round UFOs at ~200 m altitude for over 7 minutes, moving randomly and grouping near Santo Antônio da Patrulha, RS.

posts.title: A UFO spotted from Control Tower in Foz do Iguaçu [2013]
posts.text_preview:
DEC 3rd, 2013. At 8:53 pm, a military in the Control Tower at the Foz do Iguaçu Airport, Paraná, reported the sighting of an unidentified flying object at an altitude of approximately 25,000ft and about 100NM [nautical miles] from the point where the eyewitness was. The UFO was heading the Southeast direction, and for thirty minutes, the object that had the appearance of “lights, apparently red dots”, according to the military, also presented itself as “lights with green dots or light blue”, in a movement that alternated acceleration and stop.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informa

posts.title: UFO 15 meters from the ground and very close to the witness [2012]
posts.text_preview:
OCT 8th, 2012. At about 3 pm in the Ipanema neighborhood, city of Porto Alegre, State of Rio Grande do Sul, an unidentified flying object of approximately 20 meters in size was sighted for 20 seconds by a witness who described it as having an elliptical form and silver color. The UFO was going straight in the Southeast direction at about 6km/h, and at a very low altitude, of only 15 meters from the ground, and also very close to the witness – about 20 meters from him and left a trail of white condensation.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo

posts.summary: A witness in Porto Alegre's Ipanema neighborhood observed a 20-metre silver elliptical UFO at only 15 m altitude passing ~20 m away, leaving a white condensation trail.

posts.title: Stationary UFO started to move when the plane approached [2012]
posts.text_preview: JUL 18, 2012. Near Porto Trombetas Airport, city of Oriximiná, in the State of Pará, a pilot of an aircraft in plain flight spotted an unidentified flying object of amber color and undefined shape. It was apparently small and was at low speed and far from the eyewitness about 3 NM [nautical miles]. The pilot reported that, during the five minutes of observation under good visibility conditions, the object initially appeared to be stationary and that it began to move slowly as the plane approached, without leaving visible traces or causing interference on electronics, or even without being noti

posts.summary: Pilot near Porto Trombetas Airport spotted a stationary amber UFO that began moving slowly as the plane approached, undetected by TCAS.

posts.title: An experimental aircraft spotted near Santa Maria Airport? [2012]
posts.text_preview: JUL 15th, 2012. Time: 19h40m. Clear sky. Near the Municipal Airport of Santa Maria, Rio Grande do Sul. Duration: three minutes. A pilot of TAM airline company reported the sighting of an unidentified flying object, the size of a jet, 5NM in front of his aircraft. The UFO was moving in the opposite direction, with flashing red lights, at an altitude of approximately 20,000ft and heading Southwest. The COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] report contains additional observations from the pilot, according to which, “the sighting appeared to be of an experimental aircraft, for military us

posts.summary: TAM pilot near Santa Maria Airport observed a jet-sized UFO with flashing red lights moving in the opposite direction, described as possibly experimental military aircraft.

posts.title: After seeing a big UFO, a pilot makes an evasive maneuver [2012]
posts.text_preview: MAY 8th, 2012. 11:10 am. Pilot’s report of the flight of PTB-2207 from SBRP [Ribeirão Preto Airport], to SBPA [Porto Alegre Airport]. His plane was traveling between the cities of Lages, (State of Santa Catarina) and Caxias do Sul (State of Rio Grande do Sul), when he spotted a large round black UFO slowly moving towards the Southwest direction at an altitude of approximately 32,000ft and about 10 NM [nautical miles] from the eyewitness’ plane. The COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] report also states that the pilot “made a left turn, authorized by the ACC-CW [Curitiba].” The same

posts.title: Three large white UFOs over Belo Horizonte [2012]
posts.text_preview:
APRIL 20th, 2012. At 11.05 pm, in the southeastern region of the city of Belo Horizonte, State of Minas Gerais, near Serra do Curral, on a night of good visibility, a witness spotted three large white UFOs from his apartment window, with indefinite form and moving at great speed. The three UFOs were at an altitude of approximately 10 km and, according to the report, they left no trace of any kind when traveling. The sighting lasted two seconds.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência

posts.summary: Witness in Belo Horizonte observed three large white UFOs of indefinite form near Serra do Curral moving at great speed; sighting lasted two seconds.

posts.title: Pilot and co-pilot spotted a UFO on the way to Porto Alegre [2012]
posts.text_preview:
MAR 25th, 2012. Flying from Antonio Carlos Jobim Airport in Rio de Janeiro-RJ to Salgado Filho Airport in Porto Alegre-RS, the pilot and the co-pilot of flight GLO 1949 spotted an unidentified flying object about 30 meters long in size, resembling a dark balloon and traveling at a speed of over 700km/h. Witnesses spotted the UFO from a distance of approximately 5 km. The trajectory of the object that was at an estimated altitude of 38,000ft went in the Northeast direction.

posts.title: 12 UFOs with luminous halos spotted over Alegrete [2012]
posts.text_preview: MAR 3rd, 2012. In downtown Alegrete, a city in the state of Rio Grande do Sul, on a clear night, a witness observed twelve (12) unidentified flying objects with a round shape and orange color. The UFOs resembled small stars when viewed with the naked eye and  were approximately 200m apart from each other. For about two minutes, the witness observed the deslocation of the twelve UFOs to the Northeast direction, at a presumed altitude of 7km. posts.title: A UFO over Palmas-TO forced a pilot to make an evasive maneuver [2012]
posts.text_preview:
FEB 10th, 2012. At 2:50 pm, during a flight from Belém, in the State of Pará, to Brasília, DF, a pilot of a TAM Airliner reported to the Amazon Area Control Center (ACC-AZ) the detection of an unidentified flying object by the TCAS (Traffic Collision Avoidance System) of his aircraft, what forced him to make a preventive detour for safety reasons. The TAM aircraft was flying over Palmas, in the State of Tocantins when the TCAS warned.

posts.title: A bright UFO over Boa Viagem beach in Recife-PE [2011]
posts.text_preview:
OCTOBER 8th, 2011. From the balcony of his residence, in the Boa Viagem neighborhood, city of Recife, State of Pernambuco, an aircraft pilot spotted an unidentified flying object with intense light, moving above the Boa Viagem beach, from 5:25pm to 5:30pm, and performing an unusual maneuver. The witness promptly reported the sighting to the ACC-Recife [Recife-PE Area Control Center] which registered it.

According to the document filled by COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the witness: “REPORTED THAT HE SAW A STRONG LIGHT IN A PARALLEL ROUTE TO THE BOA VIAGEM BEA

posts.summary: Aircraft pilot from Boa Viagem neighborhood, Recife, watched a bright fast-moving light parallel to the beach perform a sharp high-speed right turn before disappearing over the horizon.

posts.title: Two long bright UFOs hovered above Brasília-DF for one hour [2011]
posts.text_preview:
JULY 30th, 2011. At about noon, two witnesses residing in the Cruzeiro Novo neighborhood, in Brasília-DF, observed for sixty minutes two unidentified flying objects hovering over the city at an airplane’s cruising altitude. According to the report, the two bright white UFOs were smaller and longer than an average plane and were heading slowly towards the Lago Sul direction. One of the witnesses informed COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], “that they saw two bright spots in the distance around noon. The elongated dots were moving in a random fashion and disappearing a few times.”

posts.summary: Two residents of Cruzeiro Novo in Brasília watched two elongated bright white UFOs hover and drift erratically toward Lago Sul for sixty minutes at cruising altitude.

posts.title: A UFO was sighted hovering over Londrina’s Airport [2011]
posts.text_preview: JULY 16th, 2011. At 8:15 pm. Three witnesses spotted an unidentified flying object “practically stopped” about 20 nautical miles from the east sector of Londrina Airport. The UFO consisted of flashing lights in blue, red and green and it was moving slowly from North to South. The three witnesses who spotted the UFO hovering over the Londrina’s Airport for 8 minutes are two Airport Approach Control Center employees and a commercial pilot. posts.summary: Two airport ATC employees and a commercial pilot observed a slowly moving UFO with flashing blue, red, and green lights hovering ~20NM east of Londrina Airport for 8 minutes.

posts.title: A UFO follows and mirrors a plane’s movements 2 days in a row on the same route [2011]
posts.text_preview:
JUN 30th, 2011. At 21:45z. For two days in a row, on the same route, a pilot from Total Linhas Aéreas flight TTL 9930 reported sightings of an unidentified flying object in the stretch between Carauari Airport and Porto Urucu District Airport [in Coari], both cities of the state of Amazonas. The pilot reported having identified the UFO two days with the ACAS [Onboard Anticollision System], always on the same route, and always positioning itself about 7 Nautical Miles in front of the pilot’s aircraft, following it, and copying the movements made of the pilot’s aircraft for about 7 minutes.

posts.text_preview: MAR 16th, 2011. Time: 11:00 am. For 90 minutes, on the Campus of the State University of Londrina, in the State of Paraná, about 20 people spotted a bright white UFO of “variable size”, which alternated vertical movements at high speed with stops along its trajectory. According to the witnesses, the visibility conditions were good and the object left no trails, tracks or displacement marks. There is information that the sighting was filmed, but the video file was not made available. At 18h55pm, during 15 minutes, two military operators and a meteorologist working at Eduardo Gomes Airport’s Control Tower spotted a large, dark unidentified flying object with a “V” shape and moving at high speed in the Northeast / Southwest direction. According to the observers’ report, the UFO traveled “apparently above the flight level of an ordinary aircraft, leaving behind what appeared to be condensation trails.

posts.text_preview: NOV 13th, 2010. Time: 05:20 am. Duration: approximately 5 minutes. A pilot and co-pilot of flight GLO 1131, between Boa Vista, State of Roraima and Manaus, State of Amazonas, spotted an unidentified flying object when they were 75 nautical miles from Manaus and at approximately 23,000ft of altitude. According to the witnesses’ report, the UFO consisted of a very strong light that traveled at high speed, making maneuvers above and in front of its aircraft, and heading towards the Southwest direction. posts.title: A spinning, flashing UFO spotted in Alegrete at low speed [2010]

The UFO was about 2km from the witness who described its size as larger than a car. The object flew slowly at an altitude of approximately 3km and moved from Northeast to Southeast. The UFO moved in a zigzag manner without leaving traces of condensation. Additional information from the COMDABRA’s [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] report describes that:

posts.title: A UFO at supersonic speed detected by 2 aircraft radars near Anapolis Air Base [2010]
posts.text_preview: JULY 12th, 2010. Time: 16h15pm. Duration: 15 seconds. According to the pilot, the UFO was heading North at an altitude of 38.000ft, and moving at a supersonic speed of 1.6 Ma [Mach] in front of the F5M at a distance of 20 NM [nautical miles]. posts.title: 2 star-like UFOs caused power failure near a lagoon in Nísia Floresta [2009]
posts.text_preview: JULY 19th, 2009. Time: 18h50. Duration: 90 minutes. In Lagoa de Carcará, City of Nísia Floresta, State of Rio Grande do Norte, a witness observed for 90 minutes two unidentified flying objects with blue and red color, and star-like appearance. The two objects were sighted East of Lagoa do Carcará and heading South. The UFOs moved at variable speeds in a zigzag motion and at high altitude. A power failure was reported by the witness as a parallel phenomenon caused by the UFOs during the sighting. posts.title: An airline pilot sees a triangular UFO 20 meters above his aircraft near Curitiba [2009]

According to the witness, the UFO “flew with stability, defined bow” making “not so fast crossing”. posts.title: A pilot and two air controllers sighted a spheric UFO near Santarém [2008]
posts.text_preview: OCT 17th, 2008. Time: 2:34 am. Duration: 60 seconds. Under good visibility conditions and a clear sky, two air traffic operators from the Control Tower of Santarém Airport (State of Pará) and another pilot of the GOL 1991 flight from Belém (Capital of Pará) to Santarém, spotted with the naked eye a spherical ball-sized red unidentified flying object. According to the three witnesses’ reports, the UFO traveled at high speed, moving from Northwest to Northeast at an altitude not specified by observers. The two unidentified flying objects were round with green, red and yellow colors. The UFOs were like orbs with the size of a golf ball. According to the witnesses, the objects moved in a straight line, stopped at a distance of sixty meters from where the five people were, and then went south. posts.title: Three people reported a close encounter with a cylindrical UFO and rumors of abduction attempts in Pilõezinhos-PB [1998]
posts.text_preview:
AUG 11, 1998. Time: 18h00 pm. Duration: 01h30m. In the Serra region, near the Sítio Amarelinho and Sítio João Dias, in the city of Pilõezinhos, State of Paraíba, an unidentified flying object with white color and cylindrical shape, moved at high speed at about 30 meters in altitude. According to the witnesses’ reports of the sighting, in a certain moment the UFO was only 20 meters away from them. There were rumors of abduction attempt in the nearby communities.

posts.title: Eight round UFOs followed a car  in Santo Antonio de Lisboa-SC [1998]
posts.text_preview:
SEPT 5th, 1998. Time: 9:50 pm. Duration: 1 hour. In Santo Antônio de Lisboa, a city in the state of Santa Catarina, four people reported a close encounter with eight (8) white spheres that followed their car flying in “circular formation”. The 8 UFOs had three feet in diameter each, and were only 50 meters away from the four witnesses. They managed to take photographs but the photos were not made available with this file.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.528.

posts.title: A gray cigar-shaped UFO spotted in Curitiba [1998]
posts.text_preview:
AUG 29th, 1998. Time: 20h30 pm. Duration:  not determined. In the city of Curitiba, State of Paraná, a person residing in the Xaxim neighborhood spotted an unidentified flying object in an elongated shape and gray color. The witness was not able to estimate the altitude or the speed of the UFO, which, according to her report, headed for the North direction coming from the South. The sighting was carried out on a clear night with good visibility, with no markings or trails of condensation left on the object’s trajectory.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional

posts.title: Fifteen round UFOs spotted zigzagging in Curitiba [1998]

In the Fazendinha neighborhood in Curitiba, State of Paraná, ten (10) people spotted (15) unidentified flying objects amid a rain that fell in the region during the event. The 15 UFOs were round in shape, with red and orange colors and in different sizes, some large and others small. posts.title: A ping-pong ball-like UFO spotted hovering over Curitiba [1998]
posts.text_preview:
JUNE 12th, 1998. Time: 22h04 pm. Duration: 15 minutes. In the Água Verde neighborhood, in Curitiba, State of Paraná, under a clear and cloudless sky, with good visibility, two people observed an unidentified flying object with a round shape and silver and red colors, hovering south of their position. The UFO had the appearance of a “ping-pong ball” and remained stationary at an altitude of approximately 10,000m, making circular moves. There were no reports of condensation trails, nor were photographs of the sighting taken.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacio

posts.text_preview:

When they were between kilometers 17 and 19 of highway BR040, near Brasília, Distrito Federal, six people in a car noticed that they were being followed by three triangular gray UFOs, about 700 meters away. The unidentified flying objects emitted green and red lights and started to follow the car’s speed of approximately 100km/h. According to the witnesses, the objects were about 3 meters long and were at an altitude of 5 meters in relation to the ground, keeping an 8-meter distance from each other.

posts.text_preview:

According to the COMDABRA’s report [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the witness called to report the sighting while it was still happening.

It was observed by the naked eye and, according to the report, that was the second time they saw this kind of phenomenon in that region.

posts.title: Several round white UFOs observed by eight people in Ceilândia-DF [1996]*
posts.text_preview:
Interrelated with case ARX 469

DEC 7th, 1996. Time: 8:25 pm. Duration: 30 minutes. Eight people in the Ceilândia region, Distrito Federal-DF, observed with the naked eye, several unidentified flying objects. They were “white, round, and formed by small lights”, following in a circular trajectory. According to the witnesses, the UFOS were about 3 meters in diameter, and “were in the North”, 15km apart and at an altitude also estimated at approximately 15km. All reports came from military personnel who spotted the unknown objects when they were on duty in their military organizations, and were witnessed at very close times. The duration of the sightings ranged from 10 seconds to 6 minutes depending on the region from which they were observed.

According to the report, the UFO sighted was “just a light, with no definition of shape” and its size resembled that of “an aircraft headlight seen. Its color was clear, “as if it were a car headlight” and its speed was high when moving around, but it varied.

posts.title: A small triangular red UFO spotted by 3 people in Planaltina-DF [1996]
posts.text_preview:
AUG 9th, 1996. 17:15. Duration: 40 minutes. From the window of a house in Planaltina, Distrito Federal, three people observed an unidentified flying object with a triangular shape, the size of “a single-engine plane” with red sides and white interior. According to the report, the UFO flew at slow speed and low altitude. The object came closer to where the observers were until it was “very close” making a vertical descent. The sighting occurred in “good weather” and in conditions of visibility favorable to observation, and the UFO was sighted with the naked eye.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil).

According to the pilot, the UFO was about 15 NM from the plane, at an altitude of 9,000ft. The object followed a trajectory from Gurupi util it was 90NM from Goiânia.

posts.title: A pilot spotted an unconventional aircraft in Florianópolis-SC [1996]
posts.text_preview: JULY 4th, 1996. Time: 11h30 am. Duration: 15 to 30 seconds. In his residence in Florianópolis, State of Santa Catarina, a commercial pilot observed, with the naked eye, an unidentified flying object that was “different from conventional aerodynamic patterns”. According to the witness, the UFO was “3 or 4 times larger than the aircraft that was flying close to the object” and it had “light beige” color. The UFO flew at an estimated altitude of 31,000ft, going from the Northeast to the Southwest, with “the same speed as the near aircraft, with momentary acceleration and deceleration afterwards”.

posts.title: A big star-like UFO sighted in Capão da Canoa-RS [1996]
posts.text_preview:
APRIL 2nd, 1996. Time: 20h21. Duration: 4 minutes. From their home in the Santo Antonio region, in Capão da Canoa, State of Rio Grande do Sul, three people observed an unidentified flying object at an estimated distance of 40 km. According to the witnesses, the UFO had the appearance of a star, but “larger”; and it was amber in color and was at an altitude of approximately 1km. The unknown object was spotted when it flew in the western sector of the city Capão da Canoa. The sighting was carried out with the naked eye under a cloudy sky.

posts.title: An oval zigzagging UFO was observed in Curitiba for 1 hour [1996]
posts.text_preview:
MARCH 26th, 1996. Time: 21h00. Duration: one hour. In Curitiba, State of Paraná, three people spotted an oval UFO, alternating silver, red and blue colors. According to the witnesses, the unknown object was small and zigzagged, moving at “very fast” speed. The witness who reported the sighting was unable to estimate the altitude of the sighted UFO, pointing out only that it was “quite high”. The event was observed with the naked eye and in “good weather”.

posts.title: A round large UFO was observed flying fast in Curitiba [1996]
posts.text_preview:
INTERRELATED with cases 431 and 432

MARCH 26th, 1996. Time: 9:00 pm. Duration: 15 minutes. According to the witnesses, the UFO was round, large, red in color and it was “quite high” and “very far” from the observers. Also according to the witness who reported the sighting, it was carried out with the naked eye and with a clear sky.

posts.title: A cigar shaped UFO was spotted hovering over Boqueirão in Curitiba-PR [1996]
posts.text_preview:
MARCH 25th, 1996. Time: 10h15 am. Duration: 1 minute. A military man in São José dos Pinhais, State of Paraná, along with two other people, spotted an unidentified flying object, shaped like a “cigar” and with the size of a “Boeing 707”. According to the witnesses, the UFO was silver in color and initially remained stationary, “stopped, and then started [a] rapid descent until it disappeared”. The UFO was seen with the naked eye and in a clear night, about 1,000ft above the Barracks of Boqueirão.

According to  the witnesses, the unidentified flying object was round, and its color “varied from white to black”. The UFO flew at “very slow” speed and remained in the eastern sector of the city. In the region of Taquara, State of Rio Grande do Sul, three people spotted an unidentified flying object in the shape of a bright star, in red and green colors. According to the witnesses’ report, the UFO flew at “very slow” speed, following a straight path, when it was observed “in the opposite direction from the East”, that is, in the West direction. The witnesses saw the UFO with the naked eye and in a clear sky, and they were unable to estimate the altitude of the unknown object.

posts.title: A big round UFO was observed in Cachoeirinha-RS during 40 min [1996]
posts.text_preview:
MARCH 21st, 1996. Time: 20h04. Duration: 40 minutes. A round UFO with white lights and about 20 meters in size was spotted flying fast in the city of Cachoeirinha, State of Rio Grande do Sul. According to the 5 people who observed the unknown object, it was at an altitude of approximately 1,000 meters heading North, then making a curve around itself. The sighting was carried out by the naked eye and in a clear sky. The witness who reported the case to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] said it was “Impressive! posts.text_preview:

According to the witness who reported the sighting, the UFO was at the “airplanes” altitude, but “stationary” amidst few clouds in a clear sky. It was also reported that the UFO moved “from the Pilot Plan to Guará” in the Distrito Federal.

In the north of the Guaíba River, in Porto Alegre area, State of Rio Grande do Sul, on a cloudless afternoon, a person observed round and yellow UFO, with the size “close to the size we see the Moon”. According to the witness, the unidentified flying object remained “stopped” most of the time, but then it moved in the North-South direction, at an altitude estimated by the witness as “very high”. posts.text_preview:
MARCH 5th, 1996. Time: 21h00 pm. “Everyday, during 2 hours”, in Tuparendi, State of Rio Grande do Sul, a woman says she observes a round multicolor UFO. According to the witness, the unidentified flying object, observed “from a distance, would be the size of a football”, changing colors, “from lilac to yellow and red”. The unknown object performs a vertical trajectory, “appearing high and descending slowly”. The sighting informed in this report was seen together with six more people, with the naked eye and it was also filmed, but the video was not made available.

posts.title: A man reported UFO sightings two days in a row in Ceilândia-DF [1994]
posts.text_preview:
OCT 11th, 1994 and OCT 11th, 1994. A man reported two sightings of a static UFO during two days in a row in the Ceilândia region, Distrito Federal. The witness reported that the unidentified flying object had no definite shape, but was “larger than Venus when its brightness is intense”. He also stated that the object had a color that varied between green and red, and that he was unable to estimate the altitude at which the object remained during the two sightings. He and his wife spotted the unknown object in clear skies and with the naked eye.

According to the witness that reported the sighting, the UFO was red and sometimes changed to yellow. The same witness was unable to estimate the size and shape of the object that emitted the lights. It was informed that there was filming of the sighting, but the video file was not made available.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANB

posts.title: Three people reported a round UFO sighting near the airport in Foz do Iguaçu-PR [1994]
posts.text_preview:
JAN 13th, 1994. Time: 20:40. Duration: 25 minutes. Three people reported a sighting in the vicinity of the “SBFI” [Foz do Iguaçu Airport, State of Paraná]. According to the description, the UFO was round, large, but varied in size and remained stationary during the time of the observation. The unknown object had an intense blue-green color and was positioned at “medium” height. The sighting occurred with the naked eye and under unstable weather with light rain.

posts.title: A woman observed a star-like UFO 2 days in a row in Taguatinga Norte-DF [1994]
posts.text_preview: JAN 8th and JAN 9th, 1994. 11:05 am. Duration: 7 hours in the 1st day. A woman from Taguatinga Norte, Distrito Federal, reported that she and four other people spotted unidentified flying objects for two in a row. One UFO on the 8th of January and two UFOs on the 9th of January. According to the description made by the reporting witness, the objects approached in the position where the sun is seen, and their shapes had the appearance of a bright star. The witnesses were unable to estimate the altitude, the distance or the size of the objects sighted. The sighting took place in good visibility.

posts.title: A round UFO was spotted near the Caiobá Beach, in Matinhos-PR [1994]
posts.text_preview:
JAN 5th, 1994. 00:30 am. Duration: not determined. A group of people in the region of Praia de Caiobá, coast of the State of Paraná, spotted an unidentified flying object moving in a trajectory that was perpendicular to the beach. The UFO was round and had an orange-red color and, according to the reporting witness, “the object appeared to alternately light up and go out”. Also according to the witness’s description, the UFO left a “whitish trail at the rear”. The sighting was done with the naked eye, with no records in photographs or filming.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informa

According to the witnesses, the unknown object made a vertical trajectory south of Vila Planalto, and 2 km away from the observer. The sighting took place under good visibility conditions and was carried out with the naked eye

posts.title: Two Air Force pilots reported a white light UFO flying above ‘Mach .8’ near Santa Maria-RS [1993]
posts.text_preview: SEPT 16th, 1993. Time 20:44. Duration: 3 minutes. During a training mission of the “3rd / 10th GAv – Centauro Squadron”, [located at Santa Maria Air Base] for interception missions by the Brazilian Air Force Fighter Aviation, two pilots observed an unidentified flying object for 3 minutes. According to the pilots’ description, the UFO was a white light that moved at a speed “above Mach .8” [close to the speed of sound]. Also according to the witnesses, the UFO moved from North to South and “passed the aircraft vertically” at an altitude of FL400 [40,000 feet] and at a distance of 10,000 feet.

posts.title: A pilot reports 3 UFO sightings during flights between Brasília-DF and Curitiba-PR [1993]
posts.text_preview:
JUNE 24th, 1993.

A commercial pilot on the aircraft prefix PT LSF reported three sightings, on three different days, from UFO during three flights from Brasília-DF to Curitiba-PR.

According to the pilot, the UFO varied in colors red, green, white and blue. Such lights and its high speed were the only characteristics that the pilot was able to describe from the unidentified flying object.

In the first sighting, the UFO remained above the aircraft of the reporting pilot, in the Northwest/West position, on the horizon, then below and then disappearing. Duration: 30 minutes. People on board: 4.

posts.title: Letter from a civilian to the Commander of CINDACTA II in Curitiba about UFOs [1993]
posts.text_preview:
MARCH 15th, 1993.

“Letter from a civilian to the Commander of CINDACTA II in Curitiba, State of Paraná. 

Subject: Unidentified flying objects.

Curitiba, April 9, 1993.

To Cindacta II,

Av. Mayor Erasto Gaertner, 1000

Curitiba PR

Dear Mrs.:

On  [erased] at [erased] (dawn of [erased]), with a variation of no more than 00:05 more or less, I was in the north of [erased], in the region of Rio Macuco (Fazenda Macuco), with approximate coordinates of 50 18 30 W and 11 15 00 S, with four more comrades, when, from west to east, a luminous point passed, comparable to the largest visible “stars”.

posts.title: A woman from Curitiba reported her second UFO sighting in 6 years [1993]
posts.text_preview:
MARCH 24th, 1993. 06:00 am. Duration: 10 minutes. A woman from Curitiba, who “already observed UFOs in 1987”, reported the sighting of an unidentified flying object moving vertically “from bottom to top” at high altitude in the western region of the city. According to her description, the UFO was round, with a golden and shiny color, it moved at “sharp” speed and left a “luminous trail”. As for its size, the UFO was “inferior to the Sun”, from the perspective of those who observe it in the sky. The weather was partly cloudy when the sighting occurred with the naked eye.

According to the witnesses, the UFO had an “extremely fast” speed when it moved in a straight path through the North-West direction at high altitude. posts.title: In Paracatu-MG, nine people sighted a star-like UFO 3 times faster than a jet [1992]
posts.text_preview:
JAN 10th, 1992. Time: 9:15 pm. Duration: 1 minute. Nine people spotted an unidentified flying object zigzagging in Paracatu, State of Minas Gerais. The witness described the UFO as a star-shaped object, white in color and “very fast, more than three times faster than a jet”. According to the reporting witness, the object went from the Southeast to the Northwest, “on the Rio de Janeiro-Brasilia route, in the usual route of the jets”, at the same altitude. The reporter said that a neighbor of his “observed the object and noticed excessive speed in it and called him”.

The witness was unable to estimate the altitude of the UFO but said it was close. The sighting was photographed, but the photos were not shared with this file. posts.title: A large UFO followed a military aircraft near Maricá-RJ [1991]

Four military men of the Brazilian Air Force, when flying over the region of Maricá, in the State of Rio de Janeiro, observed an unidentified flying object with the shape of a “very large, pointed star, 8 to 10 times brighter than the VARIG [an airliner]”. Also according to the reporting witness, the UFO emitted intense white lights, but after the Campos [RJ] region until it reached the Vitória [ES] region it turned red. The detection was also witnessed by 6 more people at the Airspace Control in São Roque. According to the witness, there was “recording video coverage [at] São Roque”. posts.title: A vertical multicolor UFO was spotted in Brasília-DF [1991]
posts.text_preview: APRIL 26th, 1991. Time: 19:20. Duration: not determined. A woman in Brasília, Distrito Federal, when in the company of another person, noticed an unidentified flying object “due to its strong light” that it emitted. According to the witness, the UFO was “vertical” in shape, but with the appearance of “a small star of strong brightness”, with yellow, red and bluish colors on the edges. The UFO remained stationary while it was observed, at “Noroeste in the position AZ 16 Norte”, flying low and “close to the Bike Path / Embrapa”. The sighting was carried out in clear skies and with the naked eye.

According to the witnesses, the UFO had the “shape of a star”, but “bigger”, and had the “silver color”. The sighting was carried out with the naked eye and with good visibility conditions.

posts.title: Letter willing to comply with the request, made by Comdabra, to report UFOs in the brazilian airspace [1990]
posts.text_preview:
FEB 14th, 1990. 

From: VARIG – Rio de Janeiro, February 14, 1990.

To: Brigadier […]

Commander of NUCOMDABRA

Ministry of Aeronautics

Brasilia DF

Dear sir:

We acknowledge receipt of your Official Letter 097 / CMD0 / C-201, dated December 26, 1989, which we are grateful for your attention.

We inform that we will attend to your request, when there is any report on Unidentified Flying Objects (UFOs), which may be observed in our airspace, by company airmen.

No more for the moment.

Kind regards,

[…] Director of Operations

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo N

posts.title: Six people in Guará I – DF sighted a stationary UFO [1989]
posts.text_preview:
OCT 30th, 1989. Time: 10:30 pm. Duration: 20 minutes. Six people observed an unidentified flying object in the region of Guará I, Federal District, hovering at about 200 meters high. According to the witnesses, the UFO was a “luminous ball, bigger than a football” with red, green and yellow colors. The object was positioned in the West and seemed to leave a greenish trail. The sighting was done with binoculars and in a clear sky.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.

posts.title: A man reported a close encounter with a UFO in Ceilândia-DF [1989]
posts.text_preview:
Ceilândia, Distrito Federal. Date: March 27th, 1989. Time: 10:30 pm. Duration: 5 minutes. A Security Agent of the Brasilia Airport spotted an unidentified flying object in the shape of a “full moon, without emitting strong lights”. According to the witness, the UFO was small, orange in color and remained stationary between 30 and 50 meters above the observer. Also according to the witness’s report, “the object made a 90° turn, however without moving much horizontally”. The sighting was carried out in a clear sky.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN)

posts.title: In Nova Viçosa-BA, a woman reported a close encounter, alien interference and rumors of sex with extraterrestrials [1987]
posts.text_preview:
FEB 26th, 1987. Time: 10:30 pm. Duration: 6 hours. A couple and two friends in the city of Nova Viçosa, State of Bahia, had a close contact with several UFOs that were positioned 20 meters from them. According to the witnesses, the UFOs were shaped like a “plate”, emitted the colors red, yellow and blue, and were “faster than a bullet”. Also according to the reporting witness, the unidentified flying objects flew “in a straight line, towards the sea, more precisely, towards a ship. (According to the witness, the ship does research for Petrobras).

posts.title: Two pilots in two different flights reported the same UFO over Governador Valadares-MG [1979]
posts.text_preview: November 29, 1979. Time: 11:20pm. Duration: 6 minutes. When maneuvering his aircraft over the region between the cities of Governador Valadares and Belorizonte, in the State of Minas Gerais, at about 31,000 ft of altitude, the QD 555 pilot spotted an unidentified flying object in its “1-hour” position . At the same time, the pilot of another aircraft, the VP 377 at about 50 NM from Piraí at 24,000 ft, confirms the information from the QD-555. According to the QD-555 pilot, the UFO changed color. From red, to orange, white, and it had already changed his altitude. When already 30 NM from Belo H

posts.title: A FAB pilot reported a stationary strong light near Recife-PE [1978]
posts.text_preview:
SEPT 17th, 1978. Recife-PE. 

## Translation of the report:

“At 22:52Z, the pilot of FAB 2079 (RF / NT FL 070), [going from Recife-PE to Natal-RN] reported that he was seeing a strong light as if it were landing lights of an aircraft, approximately on the 330 degree radial of the VOR REC, at 45 NM and between [levels] FL 060/070. This strong light appeared to be stationary, however it was not possible to identify the source of the luminosity. posts.title: A UFO was spotted by a pilot and the Control Tower in Recife-PE [1978]
posts.text_preview:
APRIL 2nd, 1978. Recife-PE. 

## Translation of the report:

“At approximately 00:10Z, a luminous object was seen by the two operators of this TWR [Recife Airport, Pernambuco] in the East sector of the Aerodrome. The plane PT-TYO (Boeing 727 from Transbrasil) which was starting the takeoff at that moment, was asked to make a left turn and approach the unidentified object. The PT-TYO spotted the object, but when it got closer to the sector, the object mysteriously disappeared without a trace.”

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voado
